definition: Strong aggressive price move (1-3 large-bodied candles) proving institutional commitment.
depends_on: liquidity_sweep (displacement follows confirmed sweep — it's the distribution start)
feeds_into: order_blocks (the last opposing candle before displacement IS the OB)
optimal_trade_entry (Fibonacci applied to the displacement move defines OTE)
related_to: PO3_AMD (displacement IS the start of distribution phase)
characteristics: Large candle body (70%+ body, minimal wicks)
Occurs at start of distribution phase
critical_chain: Without displacement, there is no FVG, no OB, and no OTE. Displacement is the PROOF of institutional entry. Everything in layers 4-5 depends on displacement having occurred.
what_it_proves: That the liquidity_sweep was manipulation (not breakout). That institutions have committed to the new direction. That the OB and FVG created are valid entry zones.
